chunks.title: Yahweh's Defense Against Accusations
chunks.reason: A rhetorical oracle where Yahweh defends His action of sending Israel away as a result of their iniquity.

chunks.title: The Servant's Testimony and Confidence
chunks.reason: A first-person speech by the Servant describing his obedience, suffering, and confidence in Yahweh's vindication.

chunks.title: Call to Trust and Warning to the Wicked
chunks.reason: An exhortation for the faithful to trust in Yahweh contrasted with a warning to those relying on their own fire.
